title: $800 More? Memory Crunch Derails Pricing for Framework's Newest Laptop
summary: In a Wednesday blog post , Framework’s CEO said one of its suppliers drastically increased the cost for LPCAMM2 DRAM, a lower-power, compact memory module used in Laptop 13 Pro.
